annotation:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Annotation Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant API as Backend API
    participant Student
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,API: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Enable Highlights/Outlines
    Author->>W: Select Colors (up to 5 each)
    Author->>W: Add Custom Labels
    Author->>W: Set Alt Text
    W->>W: Validate Configuration
    W->>API: Update Annotation Metadata
    API->>API: Save colorObj to activityMetadata
    API-->>W: Configuration Saved
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Annotation Options
    UI->>Student: Display Color Palette
    Student->>W: Select Text
    W->>UI: Show Annotation Menu
    Student->>W: Choose Highlight/Outline Color
    W->>UI: Apply Annotation Style
    W->>SCORM: Save Annotation State
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
    Student->>W: Continue Annotating
    loop Multiple Annotations
        Student->>W: Select and Annotate Text
        W->>SCORM: Update State
    end
carousel:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Carousel Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant API as Backend API
    participant Student
    participant V as Video Player
    
    Note over Author,API: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Add Introduction/Instruction Text
    Author->>W: Add Slide (2-12 slides)
    loop For Each Slide
        Author->>W: Select Media Type (Image/Video/Text)
        alt Image Selected
            Author->>W: Upload Image
            W->>API: Upload Image File
            API-->>W: Return Image URL
        else Video Selected
            Author->>W: Upload Video or YouTube URL
            W->>API: Save Video Reference
        else Text Only
            Author->>W: Enter Text Content
        end
        Author->>W: Add Slide Title
        Author->>W: Add Caption Text
        Author->>W: Add Description Text
    end
    Author->>W: Configure Settings
    Author->>W: Select Style (1, 2, or 3)
    Author->>W: Set Layout (Vertical/Horizontal)
    Author->>W: Enable Auto-Play (optional)
    Author->>W: Set Pause Duration
    W->>API: Save Configuration
    API-->>W: Configuration Saved
    
    Note over Student,V: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render First Slide
    W->>UI: Initialize bxSlider
    alt Auto-Play Enabled
        W->>W: Start Auto-Play Timer
        loop Auto Progression
            W->>UI: Transition to Next Slide
        end
    end
    Student->>UI: Click Navigation Arrow
    UI->>W: Navigate to Slide
    W->>UI: Render Slide Content
    alt Slide Contains Video
        W->>V: Initialize Video Player
        V->>UI: Display Video Controls
        Student->>V: Play Video
    end
    Student->>UI: Click Slide Indicator
    UI->>W: Jump to Slide
    W->>UI: Update Active Slide
categorize:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Categorize Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,UI: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Add Categories (2-6)
    loop For Each Category
        Author->>W: Enter Category Title
        Author->>W: Add Items to Category
        alt Text Items
            Author->>W: Enter Item Text
        else Image Items
            Author->>W: Upload Item Image
        end
    end
    Author->>W: Configure Settings
    Author->>W: Select Style (1-6)
    Author->>W: Set Max Attempts
    Author->>W: Configure Feedback
    Author->>W: Enable/Disable Show Me
    W->>UI: Save Configuration
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Categories
    W->>UI: Randomize Item Options
    W->>UI: Initialize jQuery Draggable
    Student->>UI: Drag Item
    UI->>W: Track Drag Position
    Student->>UI: Drop Item on Category
    UI->>W: Handle Drop Event
    W->>UI: Move Item to Category
    W->>SCORM: Save Current State
    loop Categorize All Items
        Student->>UI: Drag and Drop Items
        W->>SCORM: Update State
    end
    Student->>W: Submit Answer
    W->>V: Validate Categories
    V->>V: Compare with Correct Answers
    loop For Each Item
        V->>V: Check Category Match
    end
    V-->>W: Return Validation Results
    alt All Correct
        W->>UI: Display Success Feedback
        W->>UI: Apply Green Highlights
    else Some/All Incorrect
        W->>UI: Display Incorrect Feedback
        W->>UI: Apply Red Highlights
        alt Attempts Remaining
            W->>UI: Enable Try Again
            Student->>W: Try Again
            W->>UI: Clear Incorrect Items
        end
    end
    opt Show Me Clicked
        Student->>W: Show Me
        W->>UI: Display Correct Answers
        W->>UI: Auto-place Items
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
clic:
sequenceDiagram participant Author participant W as CLIC Widget participant UI as UI Layer participant Student participant CLIC as CLIC Server participant Iframe Note over Author,UI: Authoring Phase Author->>W: Open Editor W->>UI: Render Configuration Form Author->>W: Enter CLIC UID Author->>W: Enter Instance Name W->>W: Validate Form Fields Author->>W: Submit Configuration W->>W: Set issubmitted = true W->>UI: Hide Form, Show Iframe W->>UI: Save Configuration Note over Student,Iframe: Student Interaction Phase Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader W->>W: Build CLIC URL W->>W: baseUrl + ?clicid=UID&instancename=NAME W->>Iframe: Create Iframe Element Iframe->>CLIC: Load CLIC Component CLIC->>CLIC: Load library.js CLIC->>CLIC: Load polyfills.js CLIC->>CLIC: Load styles.css CLIC-->>Iframe: Render CLIC Content Iframe->>UI: Display CLIC Component Student->>Iframe: Interact with CLIC Note right of Student: All interactions handled
by CLIC system internally Iframe->>CLIC: Send Interaction Data CLIC->>CLIC: Process Student Input CLIC-->>Iframe: Return Results Iframe->>Student: Display Feedback
click_to_reveal:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Click to Reveal Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant API as Backend API
    participant Student
    
    Note over Author,API: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Enter Header Text
    Author->>W: Enter Instruction Text
    Author->>W: Enter Description Text (hidden content)
    Author->>W: Select Style (CTR_Style1-4)
    Author->>W: Configure Button Label
    Author->>W: Select Media Type
    alt Image Selected
        Author->>W: Upload Image
        W->>API: Upload Image
        API-->>W: Return Image URL
    else Video Selected
        Author->>W: Upload/Link Video
        W->>API: Save Video Reference
    else Audio Selected
        Author->>W: Upload Audio
        W->>API: Save Audio File
    end
    Author->>W: Select Media Placement
    Author->>W: Set Colors/Appearance
    W->>API: Save Configuration
    API-->>W: Configuration Saved
    
    Note over Student,UI: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Header
    W->>UI: Render Instruction
    W->>UI: Render Reveal Button
    W->>UI: Hide Description Content
    W->>UI: Hide Media (if present)
    Student->>UI: Click Reveal Button
    UI->>W: Handle Button Click
    W->>UI: Show Description Content
    W->>UI: Animate Content Reveal
    alt Media Present
        W->>UI: Display Media
        alt Video
            W->>UI: Initialize Video.js Player
            Student->>UI: Play Video
        else Audio
            W->>UI: Initialize Audio Player
            Student->>UI: Play Audio
        end
    end
    W->>UI: Hide Reveal Button
    Student->>W: Read Revealed Content
correction:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Correction Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,UI: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Add Text Passage
    Author->>W: Select Incorrect Word/Phrase
    W->>UI: Show Strikethrough Toolbar
    Author->>UI: Click Strikethrough
    UI->>W: Mark as Incorrect
    W->>UI: Apply Strikethrough Style
    Author->>W: Enter Correct Answer
    W->>W: Store Correction Mapping
    loop For Multiple Errors
        Author->>W: Select Incorrect Text
        Author->>W: Add Correction
    end
    Author->>W: Set Max Attempts
    Author->>W: Configure Buttons (Show Me, Reset)
    W->>UI: Save Configuration
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Text Passage
    W->>UI: Enable Text Selection
    Student->>UI: Select Word/Phrase
    UI->>W: Handle Selection
    W->>UI: Show Strikethrough Popup
    Student->>UI: Click Strikethrough
    UI->>W: Apply Strikethrough
    W->>UI: Show Input Box
    Student->>W: Enter Correction
    W->>UI: Display Correction Input
    W->>SCORM: Save Current State
    loop Correct Multiple Errors
        Student->>W: Strikethrough and Correct
        W->>SCORM: Update State
    end
    Student->>W: Submit Answer
    W->>V: Validate All Corrections
    loop For Each Correction
        V->>V: Compare Input with Correct Answer
        V->>V: Normalize Text (trim, lowercase)
    end
    V-->>W: Return Validation Results
    alt All Correct
        W->>UI: Display Success Message
        W->>UI: Apply Green Highlights
        W->>UI: Disable Inputs
    else Some/All Incorrect
        W->>UI: Display Error Message
        W->>UI: Apply Red to Incorrect
        W->>UI: Apply Green to Correct
        alt Attempts Remaining
            W->>UI: Enable Try Again
            Student->>W: Try Again
            W->>UI: Clear Incorrect Answers
            W->>UI: Keep Correct Answers
        end
    end
    opt Show Me Clicked
        Student->>W: Show Me
        W->>UI: Display All Correct Answers
        W->>UI: Fill Input Fields
        W->>UI: Disable Further Input
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
extended_response:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Extended Response Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant API as Backend API
    participant Student
    participant RTE as Rich Text Editor
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,API: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Enter Question Text
    Author->>W: Select Label Type (Primary/Secondary)
    Author->>W: Select Answer Type (Short/RTE)
    Author->>W: Set Character Limit
    Author->>W: Select Media Type
    alt Image Media
        Author->>W: Upload Image
        W->>API: Upload Image
        API-->>W: Return Image URL
        Author->>W: Set Alt Text
    else Video Media
        Author->>W: Upload/Link Video
        W->>API: Save Video Reference
    else Audio Media
        Author->>W: Upload Audio
        W->>API: Save Audio
    end
    opt Enable Answer Validation
        Author->>W: Enable allowResponse
        Author->>W: Enter Correct Answers (pipe-separated)
        Author->>W: Enable Exact Match (optional)
        Author->>W: Configure Feedback Messages
    end
    opt Enable Custom Keyboard
        Author->>W: Enable Custom Keyboard
        Author->>W: Select Language (FRA/ESP/GER/MATH)
    end
    W->>API: Save Configuration
    API-->>W: Configuration Saved
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Question
    W->>UI: Display Media
    alt Short Answer Type
        W->>UI: Render Contenteditable Div
        W->>UI: Set Character Limit
        Student->>W: Type Answer
        W->>UI: Show Character Count
    else RTE Type
        W->>RTE: Initialize Rich Text Editor
        RTE->>UI: Display Formatting Toolbar
        Student->>RTE: Enter Formatted Response
        opt Math Equations
            Student->>RTE: Insert Math Equation
            RTE->>RTE: Launch MathLive Editor
            Student->>RTE: Enter Equation
            RTE->>UI: Render LaTeX
        end
    end
    opt Custom Keyboard Enabled
        W->>UI: Display Custom Keyboard
        Student->>UI: Click Special Character
        UI->>W: Insert Character
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Draft Response
    alt Validation Enabled
        Student->>W: Submit Answer
        W->>W: Normalize Answer
        W->>W: Compare with Correct Answers
        alt Exact Match Enabled
            W->>W: Exact String Comparison
        else Flexible Match
            W->>W: Case-insensitive Comparison
        end
        alt Answer Correct
            W->>UI: Display Success Feedback
            W->>UI: Apply Green Styling
        else Answer Incorrect
            W->>UI: Display Error Feedback
            W->>UI: Apply Red Styling
        end
    else No Validation
        Student->>W: Submit Response
        W->>UI: Confirm Submission
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final Response
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
fib:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as FIB Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,UI: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Select FIB Type (Text/Dropdown/Drag-Drop)
    Author->>W: Enter Sentence
    Author->>W: Position Cursor
    Author->>W: Click Insert Blank
    alt Dropdown Type
        W->>UI: Insert Dropdown Element
        Author->>W: Add Options (2-6)
        Author->>W: Set Correct Option
        loop Add Distractors
            Author->>W: Enter Distractor Text
        end
    else Text Input Type
        W->>UI: Insert Input Field
        Author->>W: Enter Correct Answer(s)
        Author->>W: Add Alternatives (pipe-separated)
        Author->>W: Set Case Sensitivity
    else Drag-Drop Type
        W->>UI: Insert Drop Zone
        Author->>W: Enter Correct Answer
        Author->>W: Add Distractors
        W->>UI: Create Draggable Options
    end
    loop For Multiple Blanks
        Author->>W: Insert Additional Blanks
        Author->>W: Configure Each Blank
    end
    Author->>W: Set Max Attempts
    Author->>W: Configure Feedback
    W->>UI: Save Configuration
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Sentences with Blanks
    alt Dropdown Type
        W->>UI: Render Dropdown Lists
        W->>UI: Randomize Options
        Student->>UI: Select Option from Dropdown
        UI->>W: Record Selection
    else Text Input Type
        W->>UI: Render Input Fields
        Student->>UI: Type Answer
        UI->>W: Store Input
    else Drag-Drop Type
        W->>UI: Render Drop Zones
        W->>UI: Render Draggable Options
        W->>UI: Randomize Options
        W->>UI: Initialize jQuery Draggable
        Student->>UI: Drag Option
        Student->>UI: Drop on Blank
        UI->>W: Handle Drop
        W->>UI: Place Option in Blank
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Current State
    loop Fill All Blanks
        Student->>W: Provide Answers
        W->>SCORM: Update State
    end
    Student->>W: Submit Answer
    W->>V: Validate All Blanks
    loop For Each Blank
        alt Dropdown
            V->>V: Compare Selected Index
        else Text Input
            V->>V: Normalize Answer
            V->>V: Compare with Alternatives
            alt Case Sensitive
                V->>V: Exact Match
            else Case Insensitive
                V->>V: Lowercase Comparison
            end
        else Drag-Drop
            V->>V: Compare Dropped Item ID
        end
    end
    V-->>W: Return Validation Results
    alt All Correct
        W->>UI: Display Success Message
        W->>UI: Apply Green Checkmarks
    else Some/All Incorrect
        W->>UI: Display Error Message
        W->>UI: Apply Red X to Incorrect
        W->>UI: Apply Green Checkmarks to Correct
        alt Attempts Remaining
            W->>UI: Enable Try Again
            Student->>W: Try Again
            W->>UI: Clear Incorrect Answers
        end
    end
    opt Show Me Clicked
        Student->>W: Show Me
        W->>UI: Display Correct Answers
        W->>UI: Fill All Blanks
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
fib_with_image:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as FIB with Image Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant API as Backend API
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,API: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    W->>UI: Force Style 7 (Image Compatible)
    Author->>W: Enable FIB with Image
    Author->>W: Upload Paragraph Image
    W->>API: Upload Image
    API-->>W: Return Image URL
    Author->>W: Set Image Position (Top/Bottom)
    Author->>W: Add Caption
    Author->>W: Select FIB Type (Text/Dropdown/Drag-Drop)
    Author->>W: Enter Sentence
    opt Per-Sentence Image
        Author->>W: Upload Sentence Image
        W->>API: Upload Image
        API-->>W: Return Image URL
        Author->>W: Set Image Position (Left/Right)
    end
    Author->>W: Position Cursor
    Author->>W: Click Insert Blank
    alt Dropdown Type
        W->>UI: Insert Dropdown
        Author->>W: Add Options
        Author->>W: Set Correct Option
    else Text Input Type
        W->>UI: Insert Input Field
        Author->>W: Enter Correct Answers
    else Drag-Drop Type
        W->>UI: Insert Drop Zone
        Author->>W: Enter Correct Answer
        Author->>W: Add Distractors
    end
    loop For Multiple Sentences
        Author->>W: Add Sentence with Image
        Author->>W: Insert Blanks
    end
    W->>API: Save Configuration
    API-->>W: Configuration Saved
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Paragraph Image
    W->>UI: Render Image Caption
    loop For Each Sentence
        W->>UI: Render Sentence Image (if present)
        W->>UI: Render Sentence with Blanks
    end
    alt Dropdown Type
        Student->>UI: Select from Dropdown
    else Text Input Type
        Student->>UI: Type Answer
    else Drag-Drop Type
        Student->>UI: Drag and Drop Option
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save State
    Student->>W: Submit Answer
    W->>V: Validate Answers
    V-->>W: Return Results
    alt All Correct
        W->>UI: Display Success
        W->>UI: Green Highlights
    else Some Incorrect
        W->>UI: Display Errors
        W->>UI: Red/Green Highlights
        alt Attempts Remaining
            W->>UI: Enable Try Again
        end
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
flashcard:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Flashcard Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant API as Backend API
    participant Student
    
    Note over Author,API: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Add Flashcard (2-20 cards)
    loop For Each Card
        Author->>W: Configure Front Card
        alt Text Mode
            Author->>W: Enter Front Text (150 chars)
        else Media Mode
            Author->>W: Select Media Type
            alt Image
                Author->>W: Upload Image
                W->>API: Upload Image
                API-->>W: Return URL
            else Video
                Author->>W: Upload/Link Video
                W->>API: Save Video
            else Audio
                Author->>W: Upload Audio
                W->>API: Save Audio
            end
            Author->>W: Add Title/Caption
        end
        Author->>W: Configure Back Card
        Author->>W: Set Content (Text/Media)
    end
    Author->>W: Select Style (Style-1/Style-2)
    Author->>W: Set Card Color
    Author->>W: Configure Auto-Play (optional)
    Author->>W: Set Pause Duration
    W->>API: Save Configuration
    API-->>W: Configuration Saved
    
    Note over Student,UI: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render First Card (Front Face)
    W->>UI: Initialize Slider
    alt Style-2 Selected
        W->>UI: Display Progress Bar
    end
    Student->>UI: Click Card to Flip
    UI->>W: Handle Flip Event
    W->>UI: Animate Card Flip
    W->>UI: Show Back Face
    alt Media on Back
        W->>UI: Initialize Media Player
    end
    Student->>UI: Click Card Again
    UI->>W: Handle Flip Event
    W->>UI: Flip to Front Face
    Student->>UI: Click Next Arrow
    UI->>W: Navigate to Next Card
    W->>UI: Transition to Next Card
    alt Style-2 Active
        W->>UI: Update Progress Bar
    end
    alt Auto-Play Enabled
        W->>W: Start Auto-Play Timer
        loop Auto Progression
            W->>UI: Advance to Next Card
            W->>UI: Update Progress
        end
    end
    Student->>UI: Click Previous Arrow
    UI->>W: Navigate to Previous Card
    W->>UI: Show Previous Card
    Student->>UI: Click Slide Indicator
    UI->>W: Jump to Specific Card
    W->>UI: Display Selected Card
graphic_organizer:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Graphic Organizer Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant API as Backend API
    participant Student
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,API: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Upload Base Image
    W->>API: Upload Image
    API-->>W: Return Image URL
    Author->>W: Set Alt Text
    Author->>W: Click Add Hotspot
    W->>UI: Create Draggable Hotspot
    W->>UI: Enable Resize Handles
    Author->>UI: Drag Hotspot to Position
    Author->>UI: Resize Hotspot
    Author->>W: Click Hotspot to Configure
    W->>UI: Show Hotspot Settings
    Author->>W: Enter Header Label
    Author->>W: Enter Answer Text
    Author->>W: Set Character Limit
    Author->>W: Set Background Color
    Author->>W: Set Outline Color
    Author->>W: Set Lock for Student (optional)
    opt Advanced Formatting
        Author->>W: Enable Jodit Editor
    end
    loop For Multiple Hotspots
        Author->>W: Add Hotspot
        Author->>W: Configure Hotspot
    end
    Author->>W: Select Label Type
    W->>API: Save Configuration
    API-->>W: Configuration Saved
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Base Image
    W->>UI: Render Hotspot Overlays
    Student->>UI: Click Hotspot
    UI->>W: Handle Hotspot Click
    W->>UI: Open Input Modal
    W->>UI: Show Header Label
    alt Advanced Formatting Enabled
        W->>UI: Initialize Jodit Editor
        Student->>UI: Enter Formatted Text
        opt Math Equations
            Student->>UI: Insert Math Equation
            UI->>W: Launch MathLive Editor
        end
    else Basic Input
        W->>UI: Show Textarea
        Student->>UI: Enter Text
        W->>UI: Show Character Count
    end
    alt Hotspot Locked
        W->>UI: Display Read-Only Content
    else Hotspot Editable
        Student->>W: Enter Answer
        W->>SCORM: Save Hotspot Data
    end
    Student->>UI: Close Modal
    UI->>W: Save Input
    W->>UI: Update Hotspot State
    loop For Each Hotspot
        Student->>UI: Click and Fill Hotspot
        W->>SCORM: Update State
    end
    Student->>W: Submit (if enabled)
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
group_activity:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Group Activity Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant Child as Child Widgets
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,Child: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Select Style (Vertical/Horizontal/Worked Example)
    Author->>W: Drag Widget to Drop Zone
    W->>UI: Create Widget Container
    loop Add Child Widgets (up to 35)
        Author->>W: Drop Assessment Widget
        alt MCQ
            W->>Child: Initialize MCQ Widget
            Author->>Child: Configure MCQ
        else FIB
            W->>Child: Initialize FIB Widget
            Author->>Child: Configure FIB
        else True/False
            W->>Child: Initialize T/F Widget
            Author->>Child: Configure T/F
        else Match-the-Pairs
            W->>Child: Initialize MTP Widget
            Author->>Child: Configure MTP
        else Other Assessment Widget
            W->>Child: Initialize Widget
            Author->>Child: Configure Widget
        end
        Author->>W: Save Widget Configuration
    end
    Author->>W: Set Max Attempts
    Author->>W: Configure Buttons (Show Me, Reset, Try Again)
    opt Gradable Activity
        Author->>W: Enable Gradable Mode
        Author->>W: Set Time Limit
        Author->>W: Set Passing Score
    end
    W->>UI: Save Group Configuration
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Container
    alt Style: Horizontal Slider
        W->>UI: Initialize Slider Navigation
        W->>UI: Display Question 1
    else Style: Vertical
        W->>UI: Stack All Questions
    else Style: Worked Example
        W->>UI: Two-Column Layout
    end
    opt Gradable Activity
        W->>UI: Start Timer
        W->>UI: Display Timer
    end
    loop For Each Child Widget
        Student->>Child: Interact with Widget
        Child->>Child: Process Student Input
        Child->>W: Report State
        W->>SCORM: Save Individual State
    end
    alt Horizontal Style
        Student->>UI: Click Next/Previous
        UI->>W: Navigate Questions
        W->>UI: Display Question
    end
    Student->>W: Submit All Answers
    W->>V: Validate All Child Widgets
    loop For Each Child Widget
        V->>Child: Validate Widget
        Child-->>V: Return Result
        V->>V: Calculate Score
    end
    V-->>W: Return Overall Results
    W->>UI: Display Feedback Alert
    W->>UI: Show Questions Attempted
    W->>UI: Show Correct Count
    W->>UI: Show Incorrect Count
    W->>UI: Show Partial Count
    alt All Correct
        W->>UI: Display Success Message
    else Some Incorrect
        W->>UI: Display Error Message
        alt Attempts Remaining
            W->>UI: Enable Try Again
            Student->>W: Try Again
            W->>UI: Reset Incorrect Answers
        end
    end
    opt Show Me Clicked
        Student->>W: Show Me
        loop For Each Child Widget
            W->>Child: Reveal Answer
            Child->>UI: Display Correct Answer
        end
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final Group State
    W->>SCORM: Save Completion Status
    opt Gradable Activity
        W->>SCORM: Save Score
        W->>SCORM: Save Time Taken
    end
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
highlighter:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Highlighter Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,UI: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Add Sentence (up to 10)
    Author->>W: Enter Sentence Text
    Author->>W: Select Text to Highlight
    W->>UI: Show Highlight Toolbar
    Author->>UI: Click Highlight
    UI->>W: Mark Text as Correct Answer
    W->>UI: Apply Yellow Highlight
    W->>W: Store Selection Metadata
    loop For Each Sentence
        Author->>W: Add/Edit Sentence
        Author->>W: Mark Correct Highlights
    end
    Author->>W: Set Max Attempts
    Author->>W: Configure Buttons
    Author->>W: Set Appearance Color
    W->>UI: Save Configuration
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Sentences
    W->>UI: Enable Text Selection
    Student->>UI: Select Text
    UI->>W: Capture Selection
    W->>UI: Show Highlight Popup
    Student->>UI: Click MyHighLight
    UI->>W: Apply Highlight
    W->>UI: Add Yellow Background
    W->>W: Store Selection
    W->>SCORM: Save Current State
    loop Highlight Multiple Phrases
        Student->>UI: Select and Highlight
        W->>SCORM: Update State
    end
    opt Remove Highlight
        Student->>UI: Click Highlighted Text
        UI->>W: Show Delete Popup
        Student->>UI: Click Delete
        UI->>W: Remove Highlight
        W->>UI: Remove Background
    end
    Student->>W: Submit Answer
    W->>V: Validate Highlights
    loop For Each Sentence
        V->>V: Get Student Highlights
        V->>V: Get Correct Highlights
        V->>V: Compare Selections
        loop For Each Selection
            V->>V: Check Start/End Position
            V->>V: Match Text Content
        end
    end
    V-->>W: Return Validation Results
    alt All Correct
        W->>UI: Display Success Message
        W->>UI: Apply Green Color to Highlights
        W->>UI: Disable Selection
    else Some/All Incorrect
        W->>UI: Display Error Message
        W->>UI: Apply Green to Correct
        W->>UI: Apply Red to Incorrect
        W->>UI: Show Missing Highlights
        alt Attempts Remaining
            W->>UI: Enable Try Again
            Student->>W: Try Again
            W->>UI: Clear Incorrect Highlights
            W->>UI: Keep Correct Highlights
        end
    end
    opt Show Me Clicked
        Student->>W: Show Me
        W->>UI: Display All Correct Highlights
        W->>UI: Apply Highlights to Text
        W->>UI: Disable Further Selection
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
image_labeling:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Image Labeling Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant API as Backend API
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,API: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Upload Base Image
    W->>API: Upload Image
    API-->>W: Return Image URL
    Author->>W: Select Label Type (Number/Text)
    alt Number Type
        Author->>W: Select Shape (Circle/Square)
        Author->>W: Select Arrow Type
        Author->>W: Add Label
        W->>UI: Create Numbered Label
        Author->>UI: Drag Label to Position
        Author->>W: Enter Label Text
        Author->>W: Draw Arrow to Target
        W->>UI: Render Arrow Line
        opt Multiple Arrows
            Author->>W: Add Second Arrow Point
            Author->>W: Add Third Arrow Point
        end
    else Text Type
        Author->>W: Add Label
        W->>UI: Create Text Box
        Author->>W: Enter Label Text
        Author->>UI: Drag Label to Position
        Author->>UI: Resize Text Box
        opt With Arrow
            Author->>W: Enable Arrow
            Author->>W: Draw Arrow to Target
        end
    end
    Author->>W: Set Colors (Label/Text/Arrow)
    loop For Multiple Labels
        Author->>W: Add and Position Label
    end
    Author->>W: Set Max Attempts
    W->>API: Save Configuration
    API-->>W: Configuration Saved
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Base Image
    alt Number Type
        W->>UI: Render Drop Zones on Image
        W->>UI: Render Numbered Labels (randomized)
        W->>UI: Create Draggables
        W->>UI: Initialize jQuery UI Draggable
        Student->>UI: Drag Number Label
        Student->>UI: Drop on Target Zone
        UI->>W: Handle Drop Event
        W->>UI: Place Label in Zone
        W->>UI: Remove from Available List
    else Text Type
        W->>UI: Render Empty Drop Zones
        W->>UI: Render Text Labels (randomized)
        Student->>UI: Drag Text Label
        Student->>UI: Drop on Target
        UI->>W: Handle Drop
        W->>UI: Place Label
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Current State
    loop Label All Targets
        Student->>UI: Drag and Drop Labels
        W->>SCORM: Update State
    end
    Student->>W: Submit Answer
    W->>V: Validate Label Positions
    loop For Each Label
        V->>V: Check Drop Zone Match
        V->>V: Verify Label Placement
    end
    V-->>W: Return Validation Results
    alt All Correct
        W->>UI: Display Success Message
        W->>UI: Apply Green Highlights
        W->>UI: Disable Dragging
    else Some/All Incorrect
        W->>UI: Display Error Message
        W->>UI: Apply Red to Incorrect
        W->>UI: Apply Green to Correct
        alt Attempts Remaining
            W->>UI: Enable Try Again
            Student->>W: Try Again
            W->>UI: Clear Incorrect Labels
            W->>UI: Return to Available List
        end
    end
    opt Show Me Clicked
        Student->>W: Show Me
        W->>UI: Auto-place All Labels Correctly
        W->>UI: Disable Dragging
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
match_the_pairs:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Match The Pairs Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant API as Backend API
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,API: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Add Pair (2-10 pairs)
    loop For Each Pair
        Author->>W: Configure Column A
        alt Text Mode
            Author->>W: Enter Text Content
        else Image Mode
            Author->>W: Upload Image
            W->>API: Upload Image
            API-->>W: Return URL
            Author->>W: Set Display Mode
        end
        Author->>W: Configure Column B
        Author->>W: Set Content Type
        opt Individual Feedback
            Author->>W: Enable Feedback
            Author->>W: Enter Correct Feedback
            Author->>W: Enter Incorrect Feedback
        end
    end
    Author->>W: Select Style (mtpStyle1-4)
    Author->>W: Set Max Attempts
    Author->>W: Enable Shuffle Column B
    Author->>W: Configure Generic Feedback
    W->>API: Save Configuration
    API-->>W: Configuration Saved
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Column A
    W->>UI: Render Column B
    alt Shuffle Enabled
        W->>W: Randomize Column B Order
        W->>UI: Display Shuffled Column B
    end
    W->>UI: Create SVG Canvas for Lines
    W->>UI: Initialize jQuery Draggable
    alt Drag Interaction
        Student->>UI: Drag Circle from Column A
        UI->>W: Track Drag Position
        Student->>UI: Drop on Column B Item
        UI->>W: Handle Drop
        W->>UI: Draw SVG Line
        W->>UI: Display Connection
    else Click Interaction
        Student->>UI: Click Column A Item
        UI->>W: Mark as Selected
        W->>UI: Highlight Selection
        Student->>UI: Click Column B Item
        UI->>W: Create Match
        W->>UI: Draw SVG Line
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Current State
    loop Match All Pairs
        Student->>UI: Create Connections
        W->>SCORM: Update State
    end
    opt Remove Connection
        Student->>UI: Click Line
        UI->>W: Handle Line Click
        W->>UI: Remove Line
        W->>UI: Clear Connection
    end
    Student->>W: Submit Answer
    W->>V: Validate All Matches
    loop For Each Pair
        V->>V: Check Column A to Column B Match
        V->>V: Compare with Correct Pairing
    end
    V-->>W: Return Validation Results
    alt Individual Feedback Enabled
        loop For Each Pair
            alt Correct Match
                W->>UI: Display Correct Feedback
                W->>UI: Green Line
            else Incorrect Match
                W->>UI: Display Incorrect Feedback
                W->>UI: Red Line
            end
        end
    else Generic Feedback
        alt All Correct
            W->>UI: Display Generic Success
            W->>UI: All Lines Green
        else Some Incorrect
            W->>UI: Display Generic Error
            W->>UI: Color-code Lines
        end
    end
    alt Attempts Remaining
        W->>UI: Enable Try Again
        Student->>W: Try Again
        W->>UI: Clear Incorrect Lines
        W->>UI: Keep Correct Lines
    end
    opt Show Me Clicked
        Student->>W: Show Me
        W->>UI: Draw All Correct Lines
        W->>UI: Disable Interaction
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
mcq:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as MCQ Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant API as Backend API
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,API: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Select Question Type (Single/Multiple)
    Author->>W: Enter Question Text
    Author->>W: Add Options (2-10)
    loop For Each Option
        Author->>W: Enter Option Text
        alt With Media
            Author->>W: Upload Media
            W->>API: Upload Image/Video/Audio
            API-->>W: Return Media URL
        end
        opt Individual Feedback
            Author->>W: Enable Feedback
            Author->>W: Enter Custom Feedback
        end
    end
    Author->>W: Mark Correct Option(s)
    Author->>W: Select Style (Card 1-3 / Full Bleed 1-3)
    Author->>W: Select Label Type (Default/A-Z/i-x/1-10)
    Author->>W: Set Appearance Colors
    Author->>W: Set Max Attempts
    Author->>W: Enable Shuffle (optional)
    Author->>W: Configure Generic Feedback
    W->>API: Save Configuration
    API-->>W: Configuration Saved
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Question
    alt Shuffle Enabled
        W->>W: Randomize Option Order
    end
    W->>UI: Render Options
    loop For Each Option
        W->>UI: Render Option Text/Media
        W->>UI: Render Selection Control
        alt Single Select
            W->>UI: Display Radio Button
        else Multiple Select
            W->>UI: Display Checkbox
        end
    end
    alt Single Select
        Student->>UI: Click Option
        UI->>W: Deselect Previous
        UI->>W: Select New Option
        W->>UI: Update Visual State
    else Multiple Select
        Student->>UI: Click Option
        UI->>W: Toggle Selection
        W->>UI: Update Checkbox State
    end
    W->>UI: Enable Submit Button
    W->>SCORM: Save Current Selection
    Student->>W: Submit Answer
    W->>V: Validate Selection
    alt Single Select
        V->>V: Compare Selected with Correct
    else Multiple Select
        V->>V: Check All Correct Selected
        V->>V: Check No Incorrect Selected
    end
    V-->>W: Return Validation Result
    alt Individual Feedback Enabled
        loop For Each Selected Option
            W->>UI: Display Option Feedback
        end
    else Generic Feedback
        alt Correct
            W->>UI: Display Generic Success
        else Incorrect
            W->>UI: Display Generic Error
        end
    end
    W->>UI: Color-code Options
    alt Correct
        W->>UI: Apply Green Highlight
        W->>UI: Show Checkmark
    else Incorrect
        W->>UI: Apply Red Highlight
        W->>UI: Show X Mark
    end
    alt Attempts Remaining
        W->>UI: Enable Try Again
        Student->>W: Try Again
        W->>UI: Clear Selection
        W->>UI: Reset Visual State
    end
    opt Show Me Clicked
        Student->>W: Show Me
        W->>UI: Highlight Correct Answer(s)
        W->>UI: Disable Selection
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    W->>SCORM: Save Score
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
mtp_multiple:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as MTP Multiple Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant API as Backend API
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,API: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Add Pair (2-10 pairs)
    loop For Each Pair
        Author->>W: Set Pair Choice (Single/Multiple)
        Author->>W: Configure Column A
        alt Text Mode
            Author->>W: Enter Text
        else Image Mode
            Author->>W: Upload Image
            W->>API: Upload Image
            API-->>W: Return URL
        end
        Author->>W: Configure Column B Items
        alt Single Choice (1-to-1)
            Author->>W: Add 1 Match
        else Multiple Choice (1-to-n)
            Author->>W: Add Multiple Matches (up to 3)
        end
        loop For Each Column B Match
            Author->>W: Enter Text/Upload Image
        end
        opt Individual Feedback
            Author->>W: Enter Feedback Text
        end
    end
    Author->>W: Select Style (mtpStyle1-4)
    Author->>W: Set Max Attempts
    Author->>W: Enable Shuffle Column B
    W->>API: Save Configuration
    API-->>W: Configuration Saved
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Column A
    W->>UI: Render Column B
    alt Shuffle Enabled
        W->>W: Randomize Column B
        W->>UI: Display Shuffled Items
    end
    W->>UI: Create SVG Canvas
    W->>UI: Initialize Draggable
    Student->>UI: Click Column A Item
    UI->>W: Mark as Active
    W->>UI: Highlight Selection
    alt Single Choice Mode
        Student->>UI: Click Column B Item
        UI->>W: Create Single Match
        W->>UI: Draw SVG Line
    else Multiple Choice Mode
        Student->>UI: Click First Column B Item
        UI->>W: Create First Match
        W->>UI: Draw First Line
        Student->>UI: Click Second Column B Item
        UI->>W: Create Second Match
        W->>UI: Draw Second Line
        opt Third Match
            Student->>UI: Click Third Column B Item
            UI->>W: Create Third Match
            W->>UI: Draw Third Line
        end
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Current State
    loop Match All Pairs
        Student->>UI: Create Connections
        W->>SCORM: Update State
    end
    Student->>W: Submit Answer
    W->>V: Validate All Matches
    loop For Each Pair
        V->>V: Get Column A Item
        V->>V: Get Connected Column B Items
        alt Single Choice
            V->>V: Check 1-to-1 Match
        else Multiple Choice
            V->>V: Check All Required Matches
            V->>V: Verify No Extra Matches
        end
    end
    V-->>W: Return Validation Results
    alt Individual Feedback Enabled
        loop For Each Pair
            alt Correct
                W->>UI: Display Correct Feedback
                W->>UI: Green Lines
            else Incorrect
                W->>UI: Display Incorrect Feedback
                W->>UI: Red Lines
            end
        end
    else Generic Feedback
        alt All Correct
            W->>UI: Display Success Message
            W->>UI: All Lines Green
        else Some Incorrect
            W->>UI: Display Error Message
            W->>UI: Color-code Lines
        end
    end
    alt Attempts Remaining
        W->>UI: Enable Try Again
        Student->>W: Try Again
        W->>UI: Clear Incorrect Lines
    end
    opt Show Me Clicked
        Student->>W: Show Me
        W->>UI: Draw All Correct Connections
        W->>UI: Disable Interaction
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
question_answer:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Question Answer Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant RTE as Rich Text Editor
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,UI: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Enter Question Text
    Author->>W: Select Answer Type
    alt Short Answer
        Author->>W: Set Character Limit (default 150)
        W->>UI: Configure Single-line Input
    else Long Answer
        Author->>W: Set Character Limit (default 5000)
        W->>UI: Configure Textarea
    else RTE (Rich Text)
        Author->>W: Select Editor Type (Basic/Jodit)
        Author->>W: Set Character Limit (default 5000)
        alt Basic RTE
            W->>UI: Configure Cazary Editor
        else Jodit RTE
            W->>UI: Configure Jodit Editor
            Author->>W: Select Subject (ELA/Math/Science)
        end
        opt Math Support
            Author->>W: Enable MathLive
        end
    end
    opt Answer Validation
        Author->>W: Enable allowResponse
        Author->>W: Enter Correct Answers
        Author->>W: Enable Exact Match (optional)
        Author->>W: Configure Feedback
    end
    opt Custom Keyboard
        Author->>W: Enable Custom Keyboard
        Author->>W: Select Language (FRA/ESP/GER/MATH)
    end
    W->>UI: Save Configuration
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Question
    alt Short Answer
        W->>UI: Display Single-line Input
        Student->>UI: Type Answer
        W->>UI: Show Character Count
        alt Character Limit Reached
            W->>UI: Prevent Further Input
        end
    else Long Answer
        W->>UI: Display Textarea
        Student->>UI: Type Multi-line Answer
        W->>UI: Show Character Count
    else RTE
        alt Basic RTE
            W->>RTE: Initialize Cazary
            RTE->>UI: Display Basic Toolbar
        else Jodit RTE
            W->>RTE: Initialize Jodit
            RTE->>UI: Display Full Toolbar
        end
        Student->>RTE: Format Text
        Student->>UI: Apply Styling
        opt Math Equations
            Student->>RTE: Click Math Button
            RTE->>RTE: Open MathLive Editor
            Student->>RTE: Enter Equation
            RTE->>UI: Render LaTeX
        end
    end
    opt Custom Keyboard Active
        W->>UI: Display Keyboard Panel
        Student->>UI: Click Special Character
        UI->>W: Insert Character
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Draft Response
    SCORM->>SCORM: Store latency data
    alt Validation Enabled
        Student->>W: Submit Answer
        W->>V: Validate Response
        V->>V: Normalize Answer
        V->>V: Split by Pipe Separator
        loop For Each Valid Answer
            alt Exact Match Mode
                V->>V: Exact String Compare
            else Flexible Match
                V->>V: Case-insensitive Compare
                V->>V: Trim Whitespace
            end
        end
        V-->>W: Return Validation Result
        alt Correct
            W->>UI: Display Success Feedback
            W->>UI: Apply Green Border
            W->>UI: Disable Input
        else Incorrect
            W->>UI: Display Error Feedback
            W->>UI: Apply Red Border
        end
    else No Validation
        Student->>W: Submit Response
        W->>UI: Confirm Submission
        W->>UI: Disable Input
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final Response
    W->>SCORM: Set Completion Status
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
sidebar:
sequenceDiagram participant Author participant W as Sidebar Widget participant UI as UI Layer participant Student Note over Author,UI: Authoring Phase Author->>W: Open Editor W->>UI: Render Settings Panel Author->>W: Enter Header Text Author->>W: Enter Body Content Text opt Inline Images Author->>W: Insert Image in Content W->>UI: Embed Image end Author->>W: Set Default State (Expanded/Collapsed) Author->>W: Select Outline Mode Author->>W: Set Background Color Author->>W: Set Accent Color W->>UI: Save Configuration Note over Student,UI: Student Interaction Phase Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader alt Default Collapsed W->>UI: Render Header Only W->>UI: Display Right Arrow Icon W->>UI: Hide Content (height: 0) Student->>UI: Click Header/Icon UI->>W: Handle Click Event W->>UI: Toggle Checkbox State W->>UI: Animate Expand (CSS transition) W->>UI: Change Icon to Down Arrow W->>UI: Display Content (height: auto) else Default Expanded W->>UI: Render Header W->>UI: Display Down Arrow Icon W->>UI: Display Content (visible) Student->>UI: Click Header/Icon UI->>W: Handle Click Event W->>UI: Toggle Checkbox State W->>UI: Animate Collapse (CSS transition) W->>UI: Change Icon to Right Arrow W->>UI: Hide Content (height: 0) end opt Math Equations in Content W->>UI: Render LaTeX Equations end Student->>W: Read Content Student->>UI: Click Header Again UI->>W: Toggle State W->>UI: Animate Transition Note right of Student: Pure CSS-based toggle
No SCORM state saving
Informational only
sorting:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Sorting Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,UI: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Select Item Type (Text/Image)
    Author->>W: Add Sentence (1-5 sentences)
    loop For Each Sentence
        alt Text Type
            Author->>W: Enter Drag Item Text (max 150 chars)
        else Image Type
            Author->>W: Upload Drag Item Image
            Author->>W: Set Alt Text
        end
        Author->>W: Set Correct Position (sequence order)
    end
    Author->>W: Select Style (sort-style1/2/3)
    Author->>W: Set Max Attempts
    Author->>W: Configure Buttons
    Author->>W: Set Appearance Color
    W->>UI: Save Configuration
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Container
    W->>UI: Randomize Item Order
    alt Text Type
        W->>UI: Display Text Drag Items
    else Image Type
        W->>UI: Display Image Drag Items
    end
    W->>UI: Create Drop Zones (numbered)
    W->>UI: Initialize jQuery UI Draggable
    W->>UI: Initialize jQuery UI Droppable
    Student->>UI: Drag Item
    UI->>W: Track Drag Movement
    Student->>UI: Drop on Zone
    UI->>W: Handle Drop Event
    W->>W: Validate Drop Zone
    W->>UI: Place Item in Zone
    W->>UI: Update Visual State
    W->>SCORM: Save Current Order
    loop Sort All Items
        Student->>UI: Drag and Drop Items
        W->>SCORM: Update State
    end
    Student->>W: Submit Answer
    W->>V: Validate Sequence
    loop For Each Item
        V->>V: Get Current Position
        V->>V: Get Correct Position
        V->>V: Compare Positions
    end
    V-->>W: Return Validation Results
    alt All Correct
        W->>UI: Display Success Message
        W->>UI: Apply Green Highlights
        W->>UI: Disable Dragging
    else Some/All Incorrect
        W->>UI: Display Error Message
        W->>UI: Apply Green to Correct Positions
        W->>UI: Apply Red to Incorrect Positions
        alt Attempts Remaining
            W->>UI: Enable Try Again
            Student->>W: Try Again
            W->>UI: Clear Incorrect Items
            W->>UI: Keep Correct Items
        end
    end
    opt Show Me Clicked
        Student->>W: Show Me
        W->>UI: Auto-arrange in Correct Order
        W->>UI: Disable Dragging
    end
    opt Reset Clicked
        Student->>W: Reset
        W->>UI: Randomize Order Again
        W->>UI: Clear All Positions
        W->>UI: Enable Dragging
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
table_go:
sequenceDiagram participant Author participant W as Table GO Widget participant UI as UI Layer participant Student participant RTE as Jodit Editor participant SCORM as SCORM API Note over Author,UI: Authoring Phase Author->>W: Open Editor W->>UI: Show Create Table Dialog Author->>W: Enter Row Count Author->>W: Enter Column Count Author->>W: Create Table W->>UI: Generate Table Structure W->>UI: Render Table Grid loop Configure Table Author->>UI: Click Cell UI->>W: Select Cell Author->>W: Enter Cell Content opt Advanced Formatting Author->>W: Enable Jodit Editor W->>RTE: Initialize Rich Text Editor Author->>RTE: Format Cell Content end opt Merge Cells Author->>UI: Select Multiple Cells Author->>W: Merge Cells W->>UI: Combine Cells W->>W: Store Merge Metadata end opt Student Editable Cell Author->>W: Enable for Student W->>W: Mark Cell as Editable Author->>W: Set Placeholder Text end end Author->>W: Select Style Theme (1-4) Author->>W: Set Header Row Color Author->>W: Enable Row Alternation Author->>W: Set Alternating Colors Author->>W: Configure Vertical Lines Author->>W: Set Column Alignment opt Resize Columns Author->>UI: Drag Column Border UI->>W: Adjust Column Width end Author->>W: Enable Submit (optional) W->>UI: Save Configuration Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader W->>UI: Render Table Structure W->>UI: Apply Selected Style Theme W->>UI: Apply Colors and Formatting alt Submit Enabled (Interactive Mode) loop For Each Editable Cell W->>UI: Highlight Editable Cells Student->>UI: Click Editable Cell UI->>W: Focus Cell alt Basic Input W->>UI: Enable Contenteditable Student->>W: Enter Text else Advanced Formatting W->>RTE: Initialize Jodit RTE->>UI: Display Toolbar Student->>RTE: Enter Formatted Content opt Math Equations Student->>RTE: Insert Equation RTE->>UI: Render Math end end W->>SCORM: Save Cell Data end Student->>W: Submit Table W->>SCORM: Save Final Table State W->>UI: Disable Editing W->>UI: Show Confirmation else Display Only Mode W->>UI: Render Static Table Note right of Student: Read-only display
No interaction enabled end opt Reset Clicked Student->>W: Reset Table W->>UI: Clear Editable Cells W->>UI: Restore Placeholder Text end W->>SCORM: Save Final State SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
true_false:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as True/False Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant API as Backend API
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,API: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Enter Question Text
    Author->>W: Configure Option 1 (True)
    Author->>W: Configure Option 2 (False)
    opt Customize Labels
        Author->>W: Change True Label
        Author->>W: Change False Label
    end
    opt Add Media to Question
        Author->>W: Select Media Type
        alt Image
            Author->>W: Upload Image
            W->>API: Upload Image
            API-->>W: Return URL
        else Video
            Author->>W: Upload/Link Video
            W->>API: Save Video
        else Audio
            Author->>W: Upload Audio
            W->>API: Save Audio
        end
    end
    Author->>W: Set Correct Answer
    opt Individual Feedback
        Author->>W: Enable Feedback
        Author->>W: Enter Correct Feedback
        Author->>W: Enter Incorrect Feedback
    end
    Author->>W: Select Style (Card 1-3 / Full Bleed 1-3)
    Author->>W: Set Max Attempts
    Author->>W: Configure Generic Feedback
    W->>API: Save Configuration
    API-->>W: Configuration Saved
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Question
    alt Media Present
        W->>UI: Display Image/Video/Audio
        alt Video
            W->>UI: Initialize Video Player
        else Audio
            W->>UI: Initialize Audio Player
        end
    end
    W->>UI: Render True Option
    W->>UI: Render False Option
    W->>UI: Display Radio Buttons
    Student->>UI: Click True
    UI->>W: Select True Option
    W->>UI: Deselect False
    W->>UI: Highlight True
    W->>UI: Enable Submit Button
    W->>SCORM: Save Selection
    opt Change Answer
        Student->>UI: Click False
        UI->>W: Select False Option
        W->>UI: Deselect True
        W->>UI: Highlight False
        W->>SCORM: Update Selection
    end
    Student->>W: Submit Answer
    W->>V: Validate Selection
    V->>V: Compare with Correct Answer
    V-->>W: Return Result
    alt Individual Feedback Enabled
        alt Correct
            W->>UI: Display Correct Feedback
            W->>UI: Apply Green Highlight
            W->>UI: Show Checkmark
        else Incorrect
            W->>UI: Display Incorrect Feedback
            W->>UI: Apply Red Highlight
            W->>UI: Show X Mark
        end
    else Generic Feedback
        alt Correct
            W->>UI: Display Generic Success
            W->>UI: Green Styling
        else Incorrect
            W->>UI: Display Generic Error
            W->>UI: Red Styling
        end
    end
    alt Attempts Remaining
        W->>UI: Enable Try Again
        Student->>W: Try Again
        W->>UI: Clear Selection
        W->>UI: Reset Visual State
    end
    opt Show Me Clicked
        Student->>W: Show Me
        W->>UI: Select Correct Answer
        W->>UI: Display Explanation
        W->>UI: Disable Selection
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    W->>SCORM: Save Score
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
word_search:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Author
    participant W as Word Search Widget
    participant UI as UI Layer
    participant Puzzle as Puzzle Engine
    participant Student
    participant V as Validation Engine
    participant SCORM as SCORM API
    
    Note over Author,Puzzle: Authoring Phase
    Author->>W: Open Editor
    W->>UI: Render Settings Panel
    Author->>W: Add Word (up to 13 words)
    loop For Each Word
        Author->>W: Enter Word (max 13 chars)
        W->>W: Validate Word Length
        W->>W: Convert to Uppercase
    end
    Author->>W: Generate Puzzle
    W->>Puzzle: Initialize wordfind.js
    Puzzle->>Puzzle: Create 13x13 Grid
    loop For Each Word
        Puzzle->>Puzzle: Find Valid Position
        alt Horizontal Placement
            Puzzle->>Puzzle: Place Left-to-Right
        else Vertical Placement
            Puzzle->>Puzzle: Place Top-to-Bottom
        else Diagonal Placement
            Puzzle->>Puzzle: Place Diagonally
        end
    end
    Puzzle->>Puzzle: Fill Empty Cells with Random Letters
    Puzzle-->>W: Return Puzzle Grid
    W->>UI: Display Puzzle
    W->>UI: Display Word List
    Author->>W: Set Max Attempts
    Author->>W: Toggle Show Words
    Author->>W: Set Appearance Color
    opt Shuffle Puzzle
        Author->>W: Click Shuffle
        W->>Puzzle: Regenerate Puzzle
        Puzzle-->>W: New Grid
        W->>UI: Update Display
    end
    W->>UI: Save Configuration
    
    Note over Student,SCORM: Student Interaction Phase
    Student->>W: Load Widget in Reader
    W->>UI: Render Puzzle Grid (13x13)
    alt Show Words Enabled
        W->>UI: Display Word List
    end
    W->>UI: Initialize wordfindgame.js
    W->>UI: Bind Mouse/Touch Events
    Student->>UI: Click First Letter
    UI->>W: Mark Start Position
    W->>UI: Highlight Selected Cell
    Student->>UI: Drag to Last Letter
    UI->>W: Track Selection Path
    W->>UI: Highlight Selection Path
    Student->>UI: Release Mouse/Touch
    UI->>W: Complete Selection
    W->>V: Validate Selection
    V->>V: Get Selected Letters
    V->>V: Form Word from Path
    V->>V: Check Against Word List
    V->>V: Verify Orientation (H/V/Diagonal)
    alt Word Found
        V-->>W: Valid Word Match
        W->>UI: Apply Permanent Highlight
        W->>UI: Strike Through Word in List
        W->>UI: Add 'solved' Class
        W->>SCORM: Save Found Word
        alt All Words Found
            W->>UI: Display Success Message
            W->>UI: Disable Further Selection
        end
    else Invalid Selection
        V-->>W: No Match
        W->>UI: Clear Selection Highlight
    end
    loop Find All Words
        Student->>UI: Select Letters
        W->>V: Validate
        W->>SCORM: Update State
    end
    opt Submit Clicked
        Student->>W: Submit
        W->>V: Check Completion
        alt All Words Found
            W->>UI: Display Success
            W->>SCORM: Save Complete Status
        else Incomplete
            W->>UI: Show Words Remaining
            alt Attempts Remaining
                W->>UI: Enable Try Again
            end
        end
    end
    opt Show Me Clicked
        Student->>W: Show Me
        loop For Each Word
            W->>UI: Auto-highlight Word
            W->>UI: Strike Through in List
        end
        W->>UI: Disable Interaction
    end
    opt Reset Clicked
        Student->>W: Reset
        W->>UI: Clear All Highlights
        W->>UI: Restore Word List
        W->>UI: Enable Interaction
    end
    W->>SCORM: Save Final State
    SCORM-->>W: State Persisted
